events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a crew using a field method for conductor selection & sizing that is less tidy than preferred shop approach but matches listed product instructions and project requirements. No local amendment or drawing note forbids it. Reference material: NEC 310, Table 310.16.

This is a pass situation. The work is compliant - it matches product instructions and project requirements, and nothing forbids it. The method being "less tidy" doesn't make it non-compliant.
